Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 7 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}The hell're these cracks in the floor!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}This is bad... It's becoming unstable...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}We still have time, but not much.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}If these fissures reach the door, we might not be able to leave even with the keys...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Tch... It's just one thing after another, isn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}So, uh... Guess we gotta decide what to do with these keys, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I want to stay in the present. I think that's what he would've wanted, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I've been thinking... He died so suddenly, and they never even figured out the cause.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I get the feeling that he... He must've given his life to make some kind of miracle happen.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}He thought about it, weighed his options... and ultimately chose to leave this world to us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}That's why... personally... I don't want to just undo his decision.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I want to... respect his sacrifice.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}We all saw the resolve it takes to face death head-on and accept it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}That resolve, and what it brought about...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Even if it hurts, we have to accept it too. That's how we honor his memory.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}You're all about the here and now, right, Yuka-tan?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}"You gotta look forward!" That's practically your motto, ain't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Yeah, I always tell myself to look forward and let go of the past.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}But... This is different. We might be able to change something... We can't pass that up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}So you'd take away his choice for your own?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}We can actually change the past! What's wrong with wanting that!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Then let me ask you... If you prevented your father's death, what would happen?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}The people you've met, what you've gone through with them... It'd all be gone. And you wouldn't be the person you are now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}It's the same for Shinji and Miki... I wouldn't erase their deaths either.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Every single thing about my past is important... Because it all shaped who I am.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}Guys, guys! Let's all take it down a notch, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}"Take it down a notch"? Are you kidding!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}If anything, we're not taking this seriously enough! We can save him from dying![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}Don't you want to bring him back!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}But is yellin' at each other like this really gonna solve anything!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}And think about it... If we go back, we'd have to face Nyx again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}What, so you're just afraid to fight?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}Aghh... I don't know what I'm trying to say, but everyone needs to calm down, alright!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}Aigis-san, how do you think we should use the keys?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}The past or the present...? I'm just not sure.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}You seriously won't make a choice?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}The day we said our goodbyes, you were the only one who didn't show up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}You got to hear his last words, and now you even have his power...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}But you still don't know how you feel about him?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}Listen... I know it hurts, believe me. It hurts so much, I can't stand it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}...Forget it. Nothing I say will make a difference anyway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}Metis, does everyone have to agree for the keys to combine?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}Not necessarily. The keys themselves don't have opinions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}So, in other words, it's possible to take them by force and combine them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 63 0 0}"By force"...? Are you saying you want to fight!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 64 0 0}I don't want to. But if we can't agree, we don't have a choice.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}We're running out of time, and talking hasn't gotten us anywhere.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 67 0 0}This matter concerns the life of a dear friend. I doubt any of us will be easily swayed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 70 0 0}I had already made my decision—I will stand with Yukari.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 72 0 0}You're siding with Takeba? Are you sure?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 73 0 0}All right. I guess you've got your reasons and I've got mine.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 74 0 0}Well, I'm sticking with my sister! I'll protect her no matter what![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 75 0 0}That makes sense, Metis. You know what's important to you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 76 0 0}So you understand why I can't back down either, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 79 0 0}I made my feelings clear. Now you— No...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 80 0 0}Now everyone needs to recognize their own feelings.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 81 0 0}Think about who he was and what he meant to us...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 82 0 0}We'll need a proper venue for the battles. A place where the results will be absolute...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 83 0 0}I'll show you the way. Let me know when you're ready.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 84 0 0}We're really... going to fight each other...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My friends are irreconcilably divided...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What decision will I come to myself...?[n]{f 1 1}
